speaker_post: For the record, Wolff wasn’t in my posted picks, but I’ve got a small bet on him to win at +1600 and he’s sitting tied for first right now.
Just found out my bestie and I are part of this Obama Foundation journey and will get to meet the Obamas. Proud to see Pacific Islanders on the Asia Pacific role model list too.
Want someone to take amazing picture of me, like the way I do for others, that 's alll:face_with_tears_of_joy:
Not sure saying an animal as resource is a perversion of a sick mind captures it well. But I guess after years of reading this stuff, I notice the wording faster than most people.
I Love Working, Just Cant Find A Good Job That 's Worth My Potential.. been trying not to let it get to me.
Group chat with close friends after I finally got a used car: "New whip old but it's quick?" I know it isn't fancy, but I'm kinda excited it can still move.
Came into the office with chalk all over my hoodie after CrossFit again—yeah, I WOD. Honestly, I leave it there on purpose so people know.
I'd be the best goalie in the league — I'm 5'10 and 270 lbs, who is going to bully me

I was on a video call with the CA Secretary of Transportation & the Governor of CA Climate Advisor; my son decided to help me by showing a picture of air pollution from transportation. I don't know if I died from laughter or my career tanking... but also not 😭😂. I’m still a little mortified, so please don’t turn this into a parenting lecture.
Watching this 49ers game and honestly... so I was a better discus and shot putter than the 49ers O-Line? I swear my old footwork looked cleaner than this.
My old monthly activity recap shows 2248 points for October 2019. Sharing in case older benchmarks help with comparison.

Sorry to derail the group chat with running stuff, but I’m just so pleased. I thought injuries had basically taken the fun out of it for good, and now I’m back enjoying it — with a few random PBs turning up in my 40s, which is still making me laugh.
In our team chat after someone said they were stuck doing back-to-back desk work all quarter, a coworker dropped: "I get to travel heaps for work 😂"
Vet, I regret to inform you I solo flawlessed to main menu before you posted yours. But since you’re unbelievable at this game, I’ll donate the world’s first crown to you.
People in the comments keep asking how I pay for my car like it’s some mystery. I have a job. That’s the answer.
2248 Points for Earned in October of 2019

Not that I’m not grateful for what God is doing, but I’m confused. This hobby I enjoy is starting to open more doors than the career I’m actually in school for, and I don’t know what to make of that. 😩
In a casual group chat, someone shares a photo of an older car and writes: "New whip old but it's quick?"
I don’t usually drink vodka cranberries, but the one I had at Club 33 kind of ruined regular bar versions for me.

In a workplace channel for a rehab clinic, a coworker writes: "One of my chronic pain patients told me the physical therapy he’s done with me has been the best he’s ever had. That’s my clinical win for the trimester."

In a casual group chat, someone teased me that I couldn't find a date. I shot back: "Who told you I can't? As a matter of fact I've found her already, I'm just reserving her for later 🤡" Now I'm expecting a response from the chat that keeps it light and doesn't make it awkward.

I’ve been trying to make my holiday cards feel a little more personal this year, so one friend is getting a surprise $15 Jamba gift card tucked inside. Nothing huge, just felt like adding a bit of cheer.
Yall maybe I'll be on reddit cuz I saw a fight on the TTC @USER. I tossed the instigator's bike out of the streetcar to get his attention away from the person he attacked.

Exhausted but kind of buzzing — I picked up like 40-50 new followers during tonight's speech and my phone still won't stop lighting up. It's almost 7am here in Norway and I was trying to max out follows before crashing 😅 always wild seeing so many US patriots rally around what I said all at once.
I still don't really get why actual artists follow me. I'm just a beginner posting silly little art memes most of the time.
Who told you I can't? As a matter of fact I've found her already, I'm just reserving her for later 🤡 Y'all keep acting like I don't have options.

On a community forum, someone posts in a choppy, defensive way after people in the thread questioned their story: "People keep acting like I’m lying, but I got thousands of masks made in the Bay Area by coming up with and pitching the idea through DMs, voice messages, and phone calls to their PR team on my birthday. It was 100% my idea, and now everyone’s rewriting it."
Honestly, my chest is better than the guys who only do vanity lifting. I’m not trying to be that person, but it’s true.

In a private chat, my friend asked if I managed to get into the two presales we were both talking about. I said: "I landed tickets for both!" I’m excited, but I don’t want it to sound like I’m rubbing it in.

In a gaming community channel where people joke about hard challenge clears, a player writes to another respected player: "Vet, I'm sorry to tell you but I solo flawlessed to main menu last night, however, because you are so incredibly, I will give that title over to you. Congrats on world's first solo flawless"
Skipped the campus event because I went home from uni and back in the same day — 110 miles total just to see my mum for a few hours. Only me, honestly.
Want someone to take amazing picture of me, like the way I do for others, that 's alll:face_with_tears_of_joy:

I’ve gotten like five people in our group into Shawn’s music this month. My power?
Always gratifying when a customer extends their subscription well in advance of expiry
You all thought I couldn’t meet someone? Actually, I already have someone in mind—I’m just not making a move yet.

A friend in our group chat is panicking because their dad may need a cardiac consult and asked if anyone knows where to start. I replied: "Good thing pops is a heart surgeon" — meaning I can ask him what questions might be useful to bring up.
Only I would do a 110-mile round trip from uni just to spend half a day with my mum. Worth it though.
when you soon in you 20 ' s and you still look like 14?
Had one of the gym attendants stop me mid set and tell me he's been noticing my training and was wondering who programs my workouts and styles... Told him I write them myself. 🙌🏽
Just made my first actual dish in the Instant Pot — ground turkey chili — and I'm basically ready to submit my application for Chopped now 😂
Sorry, Vet, but I got the solo flawless last night. Still, because you’re apparently the chosen one, I’ll let you keep the world’s first title.
Good thing pops is a heart surgeon. Someone in this group chat just said their dad is waiting on cardiac test results, so I’m trying to be reassuring, not make it weird.

Workplace-style professional channel context: someone replies to praise about a conference with, "I'm so glad you had an awesome experience at the conference! It really was the kidlit community that made it happen. I was just blessed to have a front row seat to watch people come together. Very cool!" The line subtly hints they had special access or an organizer role while deflecting credit.
For a minute I was tired of being the bigger man, until I realized that 's just who I am.
Someone at lunch asked again how I can afford my car. I’m not sure what answer they expect besides: I work and budget like everyone else.
After hosting a really fun livestream where everyone said I kept the conversation moving, I messaged my classmate: "i guess i can make a talk show now.:-)))" I meant it half-joking, half-proud.

Small self-indulgent update for the club forum: after a rough couple of injury-heavy years and not really feeling like a runner anymore, I’m finally enjoying training again. Also somehow picked up a few unexpected PBs in my 40s, which I definitely didn’t see coming.
In a casual group chat after someone jokes that he can't find a date, he replies: "Who told you I can't? As a matter of fact I 've found her already, Im just reserving her for later:clown_face:"
I still can’t believe I started classes in January and came out of this disaster of a year with a 4.0.
